data.content: Shipment review APPROVED. Verified: (1) commits 598b787ed33e and 31ba16ffa62b are on origin/main; (2) all 6 acceptance criteria met — failedAgentsPerQueueType tracks full failure history, selectFromPool returns null on exhaustion instead of silent fallback, rotation works in both basic and advanced dispatch modes, checkAlternativeAgent no longer gated on dispatchMode; (3) 207 test files / 2370 tests green; (4) no invariants on this knot. Tagged both commits.
